user_stories.action: I want to upload property images and 3D asset data (Splats)
user_stories.outcome: so that the AI can analyze my property condition and identify needed services.

acceptance_criteria.description: System accepts and stores image/splat uploads for a specific property record.
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Upload endpoint returns '200 OK' for files under 10MB within 5 seconds; assets indexed in < 10 seconds post-upload.

acceptance_criteria.description: System validates image format and storage location.
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: System rejects files not in .png/.jpg/.gltf formats with a specific error code and displays a user-friendly message.

user_stories.action: I want to use the AI Agent to search for service providers
user_stories.outcome: so that I receive relevant contractor matches based on my property data.

acceptance_criteria.description: AI Agent returns a ranked list of providers matching uploaded property data.
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: AI response list displayed on screen within 300ms after query; top 5 providers listed with relevance scores.

acceptance_criteria.description: Search filters apply only to Pillar 1 service types.
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Filter dropdown limits options to 'Home Real Property' categories only; no options from Pillar 2 (Financials) appear.

user_stories.action: I want to view and compare bid estimates from multiple providers.
user_stories.outcome: so that I can select the best value quote for my property repairs.

acceptance_criteria.description: Bid comparison table displays cost breakdown and scope.
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Comparison table renders with 'Good-Better-Best' columns; minimum 3 bids must be displayed to render the comparison view.

user_stories.action: I want AI to extract and display CC&R and Bylaws information
user_stories.outcome: so that I am aware of property restrictions and compliance rules for my unit.

acceptance_criteria.description: AI extraction tool parses uploaded documents for regulatory text.
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: System generates an 'Extracted Clauses' view containing text with >90% confidence score; highlights relevant sections.

user_stories.action: I want to manage and track service action items across the platform
user_stories.outcome: so that I can replicate the 'System of Action' methodology for all property owners.

acceptance_criteria.description: Action items are queued in the workflow engine with timestamps.
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Workflow state transitions recorded in audit log every 100ms; status updates (Pending, In-Progress, Complete) reflect immediately in UI.

user_stories.action: I want to receive alerts about statutory deadlines for my property
user_stories.outcome: so that I can comply with legal notice requirements and avoid penalties.

acceptance_criteria.description: System sends notifications before statutory deadlines expire.
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Email/SMS notification triggered 30 days before deadline date; user receives confirmation receipt acknowledgment.

acceptance_criteria.description: Notifications are queued for delivery during offline periods.
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: System saves notification payload to queue when offline; delivery attempts resume upon reconnection within 2 hours.

user_stories.action: I want to send mass email/SMS for meeting notices and violation alerts
user_stories.outcome: so that I can efficiently communicate with owners regarding compliance issues.

acceptance_criteria.description: Bulk messaging tool sends domain-authorized emails.
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Batch message processing completes within 2 minutes for 1,000 recipients; bounce rates tracked in dashboard.

user_stories.action: I want to use the mobile app to verify data on-site
user_stories.outcome: so that I can upload evidence and manage tasks away from a desktop environment.

acceptance_criteria.description: Mobile app supports offline capture of data and media.
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: App allows camera capture and text entry without network; data syncs successfully upon reconnection with no data loss.

user_stories.action: I want to access system functions while restricted by policy
user_stories.outcome: so that sensitive property data remains isolated between tenants and roles.

acceptance_criteria.description: System enforces Row-Level Security on database rows based on user role.
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Unauthorized access attempts (e.g., viewing Tenant B data while logged in as Tenant A user) return '403 Forbidden' within 50ms.

user_stories.action: I want to process payments for my deposits or service fees
user_stories.outcome: so that I can secure a booking or pay for repairs securely.

acceptance_criteria.description: Payment gateway integration captures funds securely.
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Payment authorization response received within 5 seconds; receipt generated and emailed within 1 minute of confirmation.
